title: CellixJS API Fluent Startup Example
permitted_uses: Architecture inspiration for OpenClinXR API bootstrapping, service registration, context setup, and Azure Function-compatible handler registration.
claims_supported: The CellixJS API startup example imports OpenTelemetry setup before app initialization.

The example uses a fluent startup chain to register infrastructure services, set context, initialize application services, register Azure Function HTTP handlers for GraphQL and REST, and call startUp().
The example registers services for Mongoose, blob storage, token validation, Apollo Server, GraphQL handlers, and REST handlers.
claims_not_supported: That OpenClinXR should copy the CellixJS implementation directly rather than adapting the pattern to Hono, Azure Functions compatibility, and local deterministic tests.
That every CellixJS service boundary maps one-to-one onto OpenClinXR package boundaries.
